Package com.pallycon.widevinelibrary

Class PallyconDownloadTask

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.os.AsyncTask<java.lang.Void,​java.lang.Object,​java.lang.Void>
      • com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDownloadTask
  • public class PallyconDownloadTask
extends android.os.AsyncTask<java.lang.Void,​java.lang.Object,​java.lang.Void>
    asynchronous task that is used for downloading content.

    It can be used to download remote DASH content to local storage, and the downloaded files will be .mpd, mp4(video) and .mp4(Audio). You can also check download status and update UI for progress by using PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadEventListener.

    Created by PallyconTeam

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      protected static class  PallyconDownloadTask.LiveProfileItem  
      static class  PallyconDownloadTask.OnDemandItem  
      static interface  PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadCallback
      called by event during file download. downloading files can handled by implementing this callback.
      static interface  PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadEventListener
      called by event while downloading content
      static interface  PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadFinishCallback
      called after the file is downloaded.

      deletes previously downloaded content file
      void setCookie​(java.lang.String cookie)  
      void setModifiedMpdPath​(java.lang.String path)
      sets modified mpd file path which contains user-selected video or audio tracks by MpdTrackSelector
      if it is not set, all tracks will be download and it maybe consume more storage space
      if it is set, only selected track will be download

    • Constructor Detail

      • PallyconDownloadTask

        public PallyconDownloadTask​(android.content.Context context,
                            android.net.Uri contentUri,
                            java.lang.String contentName,
                            PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadEventListener listener,
                            android.os.Handler eventHandler,
                            PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadCallback pallyconDownloadCallback)
                     throws PallyconDownloadException
        Throws:
        PallyconDownloadException

      • PallyconDownloadTask

        public PallyconDownloadTask​(android.content.Context context,
                            android.net.Uri contentUri,
                            java.lang.String contentName,
                            PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadEventListener listener,
                            android.os.Handler eventHandler,
                            java.lang.String downloadedFolderName,
                            PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadCallback pallyconDownloadCallback,
                            PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadFinishCallback pallyconDownloadFinishCallback)
                     throws PallyconDownloadException
        constructor of PallyconDownloadTask
        Parameters:
        context - context object
        contentUri - remote content URI
        contentName - content's name which will be used for the name of downloaded content's folder
        listener - registers a listener to handle event while download
        eventHandler - event handler of MainThread
        downloadedFolderName - content download folder name
        pallyconDownloadCallback - callback for custom download function
        pallyconDownloadFinishCallback - callback for post-download process
        Throws:
        PallyconDownloadException - PallyconDownloadException

      • PallyconDownloadTask

      • getLocalUri

        public android.net.Uri getLocalUri​(android.net.Uri contentUri,
                                   java.lang.String contentName)
        acquires path of downloaded content

        The returned URI can be used for local content playback.

        Parameters:
        contentUri - URI of remote content
        contentName - content's name which will be used for the folder name of downloaded content
        Returns:
        path of downloaded content

      • isDownloadCompleted

        public boolean isDownloadCompleted()
                            throws NetworkConnectedException,
                                   PallyconDownloadException,
                                   android.os.NetworkOnMainThreadException
        checks if a download task is completed

        If the function is completed, local playback is possible. If it is not completed, it can be resumed.

        Returns:
        boolean
        Throws:
        NetworkConnectedException - NetworkConnectedException
        PallyconDownloadException - PallyconDownloadException
        android.os.NetworkOnMainThreadException - NetworkOnMainThreadException

      • removeDownloadContent

        public void removeDownloadContent()
        deletes previously downloaded content file

        deletes all of the files(.mpd, .mp4 video and .mp4 audio file) in the folder

      • setModifiedMpdPath

        public void setModifiedMpdPath​(java.lang.String path)
        sets modified mpd file path which contains user-selected video or audio tracks by MpdTrackSelector
        if it is not set, all tracks will be download and it maybe consume more storage space
        if it is set, only selected track will be download
        Parameters:
        path - modified mpd file path
